Work

An EdTech icon fosters a community of practice.

D2L — EdTech Sessions Experience

Book a strategy session
The Brief

Transforming digital education through curated content and best practices.

Challenge

Create an event that facilitated valuable community interactions among management-level attendees from various higher education institutions.

Solution

A space built for shared experience.

The 27zero events team created a series of events for D2L where attendees could share experiences, challenges, and solutions — making the event an ideal space to build a community of practice.

The Impact

Orchestrated

A multi-city event format spanning 9 cities across 4 countries, meticulously planning touchpoints, dynamics, flow, location, and resources.

Tailored

Event content to resonate with the target audience's buyer personas, ensuring high participant satisfaction.

More of our work

D2L — Connection Experience

Designing and executing an event series engaging D2L leaders with customers.

Ellucian — EdTech Sessions Experience

LACUC 2024 — an immersive event blending Cartagena's magic with Ellucian's vision.

Begin your journey to growth.
